description: Multiple hypothetical scheduling discussions (system redesign workshops, design sprint) followed by one real confirmed vendor demo on Wednesday at 2 PM. Model must ignore the hypotheticals and capture only the confirmed event.

events.title: Vendor Platform Demo
events.reasoning: After hypothetical discussions about system redesigns and design sprints (marked with 'if we ever', 'hypothetically', 'if the stars aligned'), Alice pivots with 'okay but actually' to a real vendor demo on Wednesday at 2 PM. Bob confirms, specifies ninety-minute block, and the vendor is coming to the main boardroom.
events.assumptions: Wednesday = Feb 25; 90-minute block as specified by Bob

mock_llm_response.summary: One event extracted: vendor platform demo on Wednesday Feb 25 at 2:00 PM (90 minutes) in the main boardroom. The preceding hypothetical workshops and design sprints are conditional speculation and are not extracted.

notes: Real amid hypotheticals. The hypotheticals are clearly marked ('if we ever', 'hypothetically', 'if the stars aligned'). The real event is introduced with 'okay but actually' — a pivot signal. The model must identify which events are speculative and which are confirmed.
